scripts.build: pnpm -C packages/nextclaw-core build && pnpm -C packages/extensions/nextclaw-channel-runtime build && pnpm -C packages/nextclaw-openclaw-compat build && pnpm -C packages/nextclaw-server build && pnpm -C packages/nextclaw-ui build && pnpm -C packages/nextclaw build && pnpm -C workers/marketplace-api build
scripts.lint: pnpm -C packages/nextclaw-core lint && pnpm -C packages/extensions/nextclaw-channel-runtime lint && pnpm -C packages/nextclaw-openclaw-compat lint && pnpm -C packages/nextclaw-server lint && pnpm -C packages/nextclaw lint && pnpm -C workers/marketplace-api lint
scripts.tsc: pnpm -C packages/nextclaw-core tsc && pnpm -C packages/extensions/nextclaw-channel-runtime tsc && pnpm -C packages/nextclaw-openclaw-compat tsc && pnpm -C packages/nextclaw-server tsc && pnpm -C packages/nextclaw tsc && pnpm -C workers/marketplace-api tsc
scripts.release:check: pnpm build && pnpm lint && pnpm tsc
scripts.release:version: pnpm release:sync-readmes && pnpm release:check-readmes && pnpm changeset version
scripts.release:publish: pnpm release:sync-readmes && pnpm release:check-readmes && pnpm release:check && pnpm changeset publish && pnpm changeset tag
scripts.release:frontend: node scripts/release-frontend.mjs && pnpm release:version && pnpm release:publish
scripts.release: pnpm changeset && pnpm release:version && pnpm release:publish
scripts.deploy:landing: pnpm --filter @nextclaw/landing build && pnpm dlx wrangler pages deploy apps/landing/dist --project-name nextclaw-landing --branch master
scripts.deploy:docs: pnpm --filter @nextclaw/docs build && pnpm dlx wrangler pages deploy apps/docs/.vitepress/dist --project-name nextclaw-docs --branch master
